title: The Story of General Grievous: Lord of War

"'''The Story of General Grievous: Lord of War'''" is an online supplement to ''[[Unknown Soldier: The Story of General Grievous]]'', an article in [[Star Wars Insider 86|''Star Wars Insider'' 86]]. The supplement is written by [[Abel G. Peña]], and is an exclusive [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] publication.

This supplement includes information on the origin of [[N-K Necrosis]] and his relation to [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]], the [[Izvoshra/Legends|Kaleesh Elite]], what happened to his [[IG-100 MagnaGuard/Legends|bodyguard droids]] after the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], what [[Lig sword]]s and [[Shoni spear]]s are, and the name of [[Soulless One/Legends|his starfighter]].
